---
name: Agent output feedback
about: Report what an agent got wrong (or right) on a real task — no code needed
title: "[Feedback] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The task you gave the agent
<!-- The plain-language request, and which tool you used (Claude Code, Cursor, …) -->

## What the agent produced
<!-- Paste the relevant output, or summarize the approach it took -->

## What a senior engineer would do instead
<!-- The gap: wrong architecture, insecure pattern, missing tests, bad API usage, … -->

## Which content likely caused it
<!-- Optional: the agent/skill/standard/workflow you think led the agent astray -->

**Suspected file:** `agents/...` | `skills/...` | `standards/...`

## Severity

- [ ] Produced insecure or incorrect code
- [ ] Ignored a project standard
- [ ] Lower-quality but not wrong
- [ ] Mostly good — minor polish
